questionHtml: Predict from your line of best fit the rate of reaction when the concentration of HCl is 1.00 mol dm−3.
markschemeHtml:
20.5 ×  10–3 «mol dm–3 s–1»

 

Accept any answer in the range 19.5–21.5.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Predict from your line of best fit the rate of reaction when the concentration of HCl is 1.00 mol dm−3.
